summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SaintSal Labs Platform v2 - Command Palette, Career Suite, Real Estate, and Business Center. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All major features working. Fixed Command Palette button click issue (missing toggleCommandPalette global export).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health - Returns 200 with version info
Backend: POST /api/career/cover-letter - Generates cover letters with word count and keyword matching
Backend: POST /api/career/cover-letter validation - Returns 400 for missing fields
Backend: POST /api/career/linkedin-optimize - Returns optimized profile with scores
Backend: POST /api/career/linkedin-optimize validation - Returns 400 for missing profile
Backend: POST /api/career/salary-negotiate - Returns market range and negotiation scripts
Backend: POST /api/career/salary-negotiate validation - Returns 400 for missing role
Backend: POST /api/career/network-map - Returns connections and intro templates
Backend: POST /api/career/network-map validation - Returns 400 for missing company
Backend: GET /api/realestate/listings/sale - Property search working
Backend: GET /api/realestate/value - Property valuation endpoint working
Backend: GET /api/realestate/rent - Rent estimate endpoint working
Backend: POST /api/business/patent-search - Returns prior art and FTO analysis
Backend: POST /api/business/patent-search validation - Returns 400 for missing description
Backend: POST /api/business/plan - SSE streaming working for business plan generation
Backend: POST /api/business/plan validation - Returns 400 for missing idea
Backend: POST /api/launchpad/name-check - Domain/name availability check working
Backend: POST /api/launchpad/entity-advisor - Entity recommendation working
Backend: GET /api/verticals/trending?vertical=sports - Returns trending articles
Backend: GET /api/verticals/trending?vertical=finance - Returns trending articles
Backend: GET /api/cards/market/trending - Cards market endpoint working
Backend: POST /api/metering/log - Usage metering working
Frontend: Command Palette opens via Cmd+K button click (after fix)
Frontend: Command Palette opens via Ctrl+K keyboard shortcut
Frontend: Command Palette shows 30+ navigation items with fuzzy search
Frontend: Command Palette navigation to views works correctly
Frontend: Career Suite loads with all tabs (Overview, Job Search, Tracker, Resume, Cover Letter, LinkedIn, Salary, Network, etc.)
Frontend: Real Estate view loads with 4-tab navigation (Search, Portfolio, Deal Analyzer, Ask SAL)
Frontend: Real Estate property search input and filters present
Frontend: Real Estate Distressed Deals toggle present
Frontend: Business Center loads with all tabs (Overview, Formation, Domains, Resume, Signatures, Meetings, Analytics)
Frontend: Business Center quick actions grid visible
test_credentials: No authentication required for tested endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend Career Suite APIs (cover-letter, linkedin-optimize, salary-negotiate, network-map) are working with proper validation. Real Estate APIs (listings/sale, value, rent) are functional. Business APIs (patent-search, plan SSE streaming) working. Command Palette was missing toggleCommandPalette global export - fixed by adding window.toggleCommandPalette = togglePalette in command-palette.js line 221.

fix_applied.issue: Command Palette button click not working - toggleCommandPalette function was not exposed globally
fix_applied.fix: Added window.toggleCommandPalette = togglePalette to the global exports section
